scripts.check: pnpm test && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build
scripts.security:baseline: pnpm run test:auth-hardening && pnpm run test:cdss:protected
scripts.security:catch-scan: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const roots=['src','scripts'];const exts=new Set(['.ts','.tsx','.js','.mjs']);const bad=[];const re1=/catch\\s*\\(.*\\)\\s*\\{\\s*\\}/gms;const re2=/\\.catch\\s*\\(\\s*\\(.*\\)\\s*=>\\s*\\{\\s*\\}\\s*\\)/gms;const walk=(p)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p))return;for(const e of fs.readdirSync(p,{withFileTypes:true})){const f=path.join(p,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(f);else if(exts.has(path.extname(e.name))){const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(re1.test(c)||re2.test(c))bad.push(f);re1.lastIndex=0;re2.lastIndex=0;}}};roots.forEach(walk);if(bad.length){console.error(bad.join('\\n'));process.exit(1)}console.log('No empty catch patterns found')"
scripts.security:secret-scan: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const roots=['src','scripts'];const files=['.env','.env.local','.env.example'];const exts=new Set(['.ts','.tsx','.js','.mjs','.json','.env','.md']);const ignore=/(^|[\\/])(test|tests|__tests__|fixtures?)([\\/]|$)|\\.(test|spec)\\./i;const patterns=[/AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}/,/sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}/,/-----BEGIN (RSA|EC|OPENSSH|PRIVATE) KEY-----/,/api[_-]?key\s*[:=]\s*['\"][^'\"]+['\"]/i,/password\s*[:=]\s*['\"][^'\"]+['\"]/i];const hits=[];const inspect=(f)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)||ignore.test(f)||path.basename(f).includes('test-'))return;const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(patterns.some(p=>p.test(c)))hits.push(f)};const walk=(p)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p))return;for(const e of fs.readdirSync(p,{withFileTypes:true})){const f=path.join(p,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(f);else if(exts.has(path.extname(e.name)))inspect(f);}};roots.forEach(walk);files.forEach(inspect);if(hits.length){console.error(hits.join('\\n'));process.exit(1)}console.log('No high-risk secret patterns found')"
scripts.prisma:generate: node -e "process.env.DATABASE_URL ||= 'postgresql://placeholder:placeholder@127.0.0.1:5432/placeholder?schema=public'; const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js', 'generate'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.docs:check: cd mintlify-docs && mintlify validate && mintlify broken-links
